title: Floral Silky Light Canadian Dum Stir-fry
description: A delicate floral and silky Canadian dum dish enhanced with blue food coloring for a visually striking presentation. Kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: Canadian dums
ingredients.notes: ensure they are kosher if required

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add finely chopped onions and minced garlic, cook for about 2 minutes until soft and fragrant.
Pour in water or broth, bring to boil. Add Canadian dums, soy sauce, white pepper, and a few drops of blue food coloring.
Simmer gently for around 5-7 minutes until dumplings are tender but still firm when lightly poked.
Adjust seasoning with salt if needed and serve hot.
